title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.060 - Writ to be granted without delay, unless
text:
532.060.  Writ to be granted without delay, unless. — Any court empowered to grant a writ of habeas corpus under this chapter to whom such petition shall be presented, shall grant such writ without delay, unless it appear, from the petition itself, or the documents annexed, that the party can neither be discharged nor admitted to bail, nor in any other manner relieved under the provisions of this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 1593, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1429; 1919 § 1879; 1909 § 2444 
Effective 1-02-79
